ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country (e.g., Austria, France) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region in which the country is located (e.g., Europe) */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country (e.g., AUT, FRA) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Official currency of the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government (e.g., Republic, Monarchy) */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country for which the statistic is recorded */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the recorded statistic (e.g., 2013, 2014) */,
  "emissions_per_capita" REAL /* Greenhouse gas emissions per capita for the given year (in tons) */,
  "resource_consumption" REAL /* Total resource consumption (in metric tons) */,
  "renewable_energy_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of energy from renewable sources */,
  "forest_coverage" REAL /* Percentage of land covered by forests */,
  "water_quality_index" INTEGER /* Index indicating the quality of water (0-100) */,
  "air_quality_index" INTEGER /* Index indicating the quality of air (0-100) */,
  "waste_generated" REAL /* Total waste generated (in metric tons) */,
  "waste_recycled" REAL /* Percentage of waste recycled */,
  "energy_consumption_per_capita" REAL /* Energy consumption per capita (in kWh) */,
  "carbon_footprint" REAL /* Total carbon footprint (in tons of CO2) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., national statistics office, international organization) */,
  "data_entry_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was entered into the system */,
  "data_last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was last modified */,
  "data_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the data */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of data validation (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_statistics_data_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("data_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("username"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_statistics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Data Contributor, Analyst, Administrator) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_password_change_date" TEXT /* Date of the last password change */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
